title: Define behavior for scorecard-improvement skill
description:
As a Plexus operator, I want a reusable skill that guides iterative score improvement, so that I can raise score quality with measurable evidence.

Feature: Improve score quality with a reusable skill
Scenario: Use a structured loop to improve one score
Given a score, baseline evaluation metrics, and feedback examples
When the agent applies the skill workflow
Then it proposes focused changes, validates impact, and reports baseline-vs-new metrics
